scenes.description: Man in his late 50s, casual clothing (jeans, light jacket), holding the Seese Pro blower effortlessly in one hand at waist height. Autumn patio setting with golden oak leaves mid-air, caught in motion blur. He's relaxed, slight smile, not leaning forward. Shot from the side at a low angle to emphasize the one-handed effortless grip. Warm late-afternoon golden hour light. Clean stone or composite deck visible in background.
scenes.mood: Warm, effortless, liberating — active but relaxed

scenes.description: Middle-aged man hunched over a broom on a leaf-covered patio, tired posture — back slightly curved, one hand on lower back mid-sweep. Expression is resigned, not angry. Pile of leaves barely moved. Late afternoon light, slightly desaturated warm tones to reinforce the fatigue. Cluttered garage door visible slightly out of focus in background.
scenes.mood: Relatable fatigue, honest frustration — not dramatic, just tired

scenes.description: Split image: LEFT — a dusty, heavy gas blower sitting neglected in a dark garage corner, cobweb on the handle, fuel can beside it. RIGHT — a cluttered shelf with bunched-up microfiber car cloths, an old plastic ice scraper, and a half-empty bottle of car detailer. Both sides feel abandoned and inefficient. Slightly cool, shadowy indoor lighting.
scenes.mood: Outdated, cluttered, ineffective — the old world

scenes.description: Clean product shot of the Seese Pro held loosely in one open hand, fingers relaxed — not gripping tightly. Shot against a blurred autumn driveway background with warm bokeh. In the foreground corner, a 1kg sugar bag placed next to the blower for weight comparison. The blower should look sleek and compact — almost surprisingly small for what it does. Soft natural daylight.

Triptych of three square panels side by side. Panel 1: Seese Pro blowing a wave of autumn leaves off a clean patio, digital timer overlay showing 4:58, sharp motion blur on leaves. Panel 2: Water droplets exploding off wet dark car paint in slow-motion-style freeze frame, gleaming finish, no cloth visible. Panel 3: Frosted windshield with blower directed at it, frost particles dispersing in cold morning air, breath mist visible. Consistent natural warm-to-cool lighting across panels.
scenes.mood: Decisive, proof-driven, satisfying — results you can see

scenes.description: Four-panel seasonal collage arranged in a 2x2 grid. Top-left: autumn — man blowing leaves from stone patio, warm amber light. Top-right: winter — frost clearing off windshield, cold blue-white morning. Bottom-left: spring — sawdust and fine debris being swept out of a garage workshop by airflow. Bottom-right: summer — gleaming wet car drying in bright sun after a wash, man smiling. Each panel has natural light consistent with its season. Same person across all panels for continuity.
scenes.mood: Versatile, seasonal, practical — one tool for every moment

scenes.description: Flat lay overhead shot: Seese Pro blower centered in an open premium hard-shell carrying case with foam insert. Fast charger placed neatly to the right, ear protection plugs to the left, all on a clean light grey or white surface. Shadows are soft and natural. Premium unboxing feel — products arranged with breathing room, not crammed. A subtle price tag or label showing $119.99 could be lightly incorporated as a prop.
scenes.mood: Premium, organized, great value — ready to use out of the box

scenes.description: Man in his late 50s standing upright, fully relaxed posture, holding the Seese Pro casually at his side with one hand — almost like holding a travel mug. He's smiling naturally, not posed. Behind him: a spotlessly clean patio or driveway with crisp autumn light. Shot from slightly below eye level to convey confidence and pride. Warm morning sunlight. No strain, no sweat, no clutter — just a clean outdoor space and a man who got it done in minutes.
scenes.mood: Confident, proud, effortless — the after state
